message:
Merge PR #2397: fix(polecat): use ClonePath for best-effort push in nuke

Use polecatInfo.ClonePath instead of constructing the worktree path manually.
The worktree lives at <rig>/polecats/<name>/<rigName>/, not <rig>/polecats/<name>/.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2397
Author: Rome-1

Co-Authored-By: Rome Thorstenson <rome-1@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
